name: Sourdough Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the starter, milk, margarine, sugar, and yeast.
2. Gradually add the bread flour and stir until well combined.
3. Add the salt and rolled oats, stirring to incorporate evenly.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
5. Cover and let rise at room temperature for 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
